notableEvents.label: Isaac Collins plunked
notableEvents.detail: Isaac Collins hit by pitch. Jac Caglianone to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Bobby Witt Jr. GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Bobby Witt Jr. grounds into a double play, second baseman Luke Keaschall to first baseman Victor Caratini. Kyle Isbel out at 2nd. Bobby Witt Jr. out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Twins challenged (tag play), call on the field was upheld: Vinnie Pasquantino reaches on a fielder's choice. Kyle Isbel scores. Maikel Garcia to 2nd. Throwing error by first baseman Victor Caratini.

notableEvents.label: Jonathan India grand slam
notableEvents.detail: Jonathan India hits a grand slam (1) to left field. Maikel Garcia scores. Vinnie Pasquantino scores. Salvador Perez scores.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Royce Lewis reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Nick Loftin. Josh Bell to 3rd. Royce Lewis to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Royce Lewis reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Nick Loftin. Josh Bell to 3rd. Royce Lewis to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Tyler Tolbert GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Tolbert grounds into a double play, shortstop Brooks Lee to second baseman Luke Keaschall to first baseman Victor Caratini. Nick Loftin out at 2nd. Tyler Tolbert out at 1st.
